metadata.description: The Ashen Knives' warehouse district on Warren. Converted cargo bays stacked three deep, lit by sodium lamps and the faint hum of overworked life support.

content_hints.description: The dock level. Cargo containers stacked in rows, each one tagged with Ashen Knives sigils -- a curved blade wreathed in smoke. The air smells of packing foam and something sweetly chemical that catches in the back of the throat. Memish product, you'd guess, even sealed.
content_hints.read_aloud: You dock at Bay 14, as instructed. The cargo level is quiet except for the rhythmic clang of an automated loader cycling somewhere out of sight. A figure detaches from the shadows between containers -- tall, armored in light composite, the Ashen Knives emblem on her shoulder.

npcs.name: Ashen Knives Lieutenant Vesh
npcs.dialogue: The shipment's ready. But we're moving it tonight -- Hegemonic Intelligence has been sniffing around. My people spotted a surveillance drone on Level 3 two hours ago. We scragged it, but where there's one there's more. Load fast, fly faster.
npcs.notes: Lieutenant Vesh (she/her). Professional, terse, and visibly on edge. She's armed with a plasma carbine and hasn't holstered it since you arrived. The Ashen Knives are friendly, but Vesh makes it clear: if this job goes sideways, the crew takes the heat, not her people.

content_hints.description: The cargo hold. Twelve sealed crates of Memish psychedelics, each one the size of a coffin and twice as heavy. The product inside is packed in thermal gel to defeat scan detection. Vesh's crew has already moved the crates onto mag-sleds for transfer. All you need to do is get them to the Faraday.

loot.name: Memish psychedelics (12 crates)
loot.description: Sealed cargo. Do not open. The thermal gel keeps the contents scan-invisible for approximately six hours before it degrades.

event_triggers: Vesh's comm chirps. Her expression goes flat. 'We've got company. Hegemonic agent, Level 2, moving this way. Could be coincidence. I don't believe in coincidence.'

content_hints.description: The loading corridor. A narrow passage between container stacks leading back to your docking bay. Emergency lights paint everything in alternating bands of red and shadow. The mag-sleds hum along the deck plating, carrying your very illegal cargo toward the ship.
event_triggers: A figure steps from behind a container stack. Plain clothes, but the posture is military. One hand rests on a concealed sidearm. 'Interesting cargo for a registered freight hauler. Mind if I take a closer look?'
content_hints.investigation_success: The agent is alone. No backup comm, no visible body cam. This might be off-books surveillance -- a solo intelligence op. If they disappear, nobody comes looking. At least, not immediately.
